nasb.text: unloving, irreconcilable, malicious gossips, without self-control, brutal, haters of good,

esv.text: heartless, unappeasable, slanderous, without self-control, brutal, not loving good,

cnv.text: 沒有親情、不肯和解、惡言中傷、不能自律、橫蠻兇暴、不愛良善、

ccb.text: 冷漠无情、不愿和解、好说谗言、毫无节制、蛮横凶暴、不爱良善、

csbs.text: 没有亲情、不肯和解、恶意控告、不能自制、残忍凶暴、不爱良善、
